creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Unable to replicate. Please update your ports tree, remove any custom cflags, make flags from make.conf. 
Join the freebsd-ports mailing list and post your envirnoment there. 
It appears to be something specific to your environment.  You tested with 9.0, I386. 
Below are build logs for both 9.0 and 7.4. Builds fine in tinderbox with defaults. 

Build logs: 
7.4: http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/7-scheidell_I386/prelude-pflogger-0.9.0.r2_1.log 
9.0: http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/9-scheidell_I386/prelude-pflogger-0.9.0.r2_1.log
